sellers_note: Discover the ultimate in off-road capability and open-air freedom with this 2023 Jeep Wrangler Sahara. Boasting a powerful 3.6L V6 engine paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission, this 4WD Wrangler is ready to take you on unforgettable adventures. - COLD WEATHER GROUP: Includes Heated Steering Wheel, Remote Start System, Heated Front Seats - 8-Speed Automatic Transmission - Side Steps - Sky 1-Touch Power Top: Rear Window Defroster, Rear Window Wiper/Washer, Removable Rear Quarter Windows, Power Top Quarter Window Storage Bag - Tires: 255/70R18 All-Terrain - Wheels: 18 x 7.5 Tech Gray Machined Face Enjoy the convenience of features like a Navigation System, ParkView Rear Back-Up Camera, Apple CarPlay/Android Auto, and a premium 9-speaker audio system. Stay comfortable in all conditions with dual-zone climate control, heated front seats, and a heated steering wheel. With its rugged construction, impressive off-road capabilities, and exceptional versatility, this Wrangler Sahara is the ultimate companion for your next adventure. Schedule a test drive today and experience the freedom of open-air driving. This vehicle is protected by the remainder of the original manufacturer's warranty. Total SRP is not the sales price and does not include taxes, tags, title, adjusted market value, dealer installed equipment (if applicable), and $490 dealer documentary fee.
